rag_rules: Fix 'named thing must be an expression with a type' by resolving root identifier references or deleting invalid clauses
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers or types not present in the AADL model
generic_rules: Validate AGREE expressions for type consistency and scope-appropriate references
Ensure all AGREE variables and helpers are declared or visible in the current annex
Avoid encoding AADL property associations directly into AGREE expressions
Delete invalid AGREE clauses rather than inventing new architecture
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must reside in valid annex scopes (type vs implementation)
Numeric, Boolean, and real types in AGREE must match scalar declarations: int, real, bool
anti_patterns: Do not add new component ports or data types to AGREE contracts that are not already in the AADL model
Do not assume AADL property names like Period or Deadline are automatically available as AGREE variables
irrelevant_topics: AADL Inspector diagnostics about property associations
AGREE annex placement in component types vs implementations
Model fusion or owner/scope preservation rules
